languages.text: "Перспективы — прогнозируемые варианты событий — оцениваю с умеренным оптимизмом. Поставки {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}прометия{/g} на станцию Алтарь-Темплум будут восстановлены в кратчайшие сроки. Также я прошу Вашу Светлость принять дар в рамках выражения благодарности — материального поощрения — за оказанную помощь". {n}Повинуясь жесту Декабалуса, двое технопровидцев подносят вам богато украшенный {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугмент{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Перспективы — прогнозируемые варианты событий — оцениваю с умеренным оптимизмом. Поставки {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}прометия{/g} на станцию Алтарь-Темплум будут восстановлены в кратчайшие сроки. Также я прошу Вашу Светлость принять дар в рамках выражения благодарности — материального поощрения — за оказанную помощь". {n}Повинуясь жесту Декабалуса, двое технопровидцев подносят вам богато украшенный {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугмент{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: "Prospects — predicted scenarios — are assessed with moderate optimism. {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}Promethium{/g} supplies to Altar-Templum Station will be restored as soon as possible. I also request that Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} accept this gift as an expression of gratitude — material reinforcement — for your assistance." {n}At a gesture from Decabalus, two Enginseers present you with a lavishly adorned {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augment{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: 「予測：状況は楽観的です。アルタール・テンプル駅へのプローメチウムの供給は、できるだけ早く再開されます。このユニットは、貴{mf|御|御}の支援への感謝の意を表すために、貴{mf|御|御}にこの贈り物を受け取ってもらいたいと思います」{n}デカバルスのジェスチャーで、2人のエンジニアが、豪華に飾られた増幅器を贈呈する。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Prediction: prospects are assessed with moderate optimism. Promethium supplies to Altar-Templum Station will be restored as soon as possible. This unit also requests that Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} accept this gift as an expression of gratitude for your assistance." {n}At a gesture from Decabalus, two Enginseers present you with a lavishly adorned augment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「予測：状況は楽観的です。アルタール・テンプル駅へのプローメチウムの供給は、できるだけ早く再開されます。このユニットは、貴{mf|御|御}の支援への感謝の意を表すために、貴{mf|御|御}にこの贈り物を受け取ってもらいたいと思います。」{n}デカバルスのジェスチャーで、2人のエンジニアが、豪華に飾られた増幅器を贈呈する。{/n}

languages.text: Beklentiler, yani tahminî senaryolar; ılımlı bir iyimserlikle değerlendirilmekte. Altar-Templum İstasyonu'na {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prometyum{/g} ikmali, mümkün olan en kısa sürede yeniden başlayacaktır. Ayrıca yardımınız için bir minnettarlık ifadesi olarak {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'nin bu maddi takviye armağanını kabul etmesini talep etmekteyim." {n}Decabalus'un bir işaretiyle iki mühedyum, sana abartılı bir şekilde süslenmiş bir {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}ogment{/g} sunuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Prospects — predicted scenarios — are assessed with moderate optimism. {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}Promethium{/g} supplies to Altar-Templum Station will be restored as soon as possible. I also request that Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} accept this gift as an expression of gratitude — material reinforcement — for your assistance." {n}At a gesture from Decabalus, two Enginseers present you with a lavishly adorned {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augment{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: Beklentiler, yani tahminî senaryolar; ılımlı bir iyimserlikle değerlendirilmekte. Altar-Templum İstasyonu'na {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prometyum{/g} ikmali, mümkün olan en kısa sürede yeniden başlayacaktır. Ayrıca yardımınız için bir minnettarlık ifadesi olarak {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'nin bu maddi takviye armağanını kabul etmesini talep etmekteyim." {n}Decabalus'un bir işaretiyle iki mühedyum, sana abartılı bir şekilde süslenmiş bir {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}ogment{/g} sunuyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Las perspectivas, los escenarios previstos, ofrecen un moderado optimismo. El suministro de {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prometio{/g} a la estación Altar-Templum se reanudará lo antes posible. Esta unidad también solicita que mi{mf|lord|lady} acepte este obsequio como muestra de gratitud, refuerzo material, por la ayuda prestada». {n}Decabalus hace un gesto y dos visioingenieros te entregan un {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}aumento{/g} profusamente ornamentado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Prospects — predicted scenarios — are assessed with moderate optimism. {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}Promethium{/g} supplies to Altar-Templum Station will be restored as soon as possible. I also request that Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} accept this gift as an expression of gratitude — material reinforcement — for your assistance." {n}At a gesture from Decabalus, two Enginseers present you with a lavishly adorned {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augment{/g}.{/n}

Esta unidad también solicita que mi{mf|lord|lady} acepte este obsequio como muestra de gratitud, refuerzo material, por la ayuda prestada». {n}Decabalus hace un gesto y dos visioingenieros te entregan un {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}aumento{/g} profusamente ornamentado.{/n}

languages.text: “前景，即预估情景，评估为‘审慎乐观’。对祭坛星站的{g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}钷素{/g}供应将尽快恢复。我恳请大人接受这份赠礼（物质助益），以表达我们对您鼎力相助的感激之情。”{n}在德卡巴洛斯的示意下，两名引擎先知向你呈上一件装饰华丽的{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物{/g}。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Prospects — predicted scenarios — are assessed with moderate optimism. {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}Promethium{/g} supplies to Altar-Templum Station will be restored as soon as possible. I also request that Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} accept this gift as an expression of gratitude — material reinforcement — for your assistance." {n}At a gesture from Decabalus, two Enginseers present you with a lavishly adorned {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augment{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “前景，即预估情景，评估为‘审慎乐观’。对祭坛星站的{g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}钷素{/g}供应将尽快恢复。我恳请大人接受这份赠礼（物质助益），以表达我们对您鼎力相助的感激之情。”{n}在德卡巴洛斯的示意下，两名引擎先知向你呈上一件装饰华丽的{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物{/g}。{/n}

languages.text: « De telles perspectives... des scénarios prévisibles... sont jugées modérément optimistes. Le ravitaillement en {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prométhium{/g} de la station d'Altar-Templum reprendra dès que possible. Par ailleurs, cette unité prie humblement Votre Seigneurie de bien vouloir accepter ce modeste gage de reconnaissance... du matériel de renforcement... pour son aide. » {n}Sur un geste de Décabalus, deux technaugures vous offrent une {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} somptueusement ouvragée.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Prospects — predicted scenarios — are assessed with moderate optimism. {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}Promethium{/g} supplies to Altar-Templum Station will be restored as soon as possible. I also request that Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} accept this gift as an expression of gratitude — material reinforcement — for your assistance." {n}At a gesture from Decabalus, two Enginseers present you with a lavishly adorned {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augment{/g}.{/n}

Par ailleurs, cette unité prie humblement Votre Seigneurie de bien vouloir accepter ce modeste gage de reconnaissance... du matériel de renforcement... pour son aide. » {n}Sur un geste de Décabalus, deux technaugures vous offrent une {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} somptueusement ouvragée.{/n}

languages.text: "Perspektiven — prognostizierte Szenarien — werden mit moderatem Optimismus bewertet. {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}Promethiumlieferungen{/g} zu Station Altar-Templum werden baldmöglichst wieder aufgenommen. Ich bitte Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} überdies, dieses Geschenk als Ausdruck von Dankbarkeit — materielle Verstärkung — für Eure Unterstützung zu akzeptieren." {n}Auf ein Zeichen von Decabalus überreichen dir zwei Maschinenseher eine aufwendig verzierte {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentation{/g}.{/n}
